## Description
<!-- Describe your changes clearly and concisely -->

## Motivation and Context
<!-- Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Related Issue
<!-- Use one:
- Refs #123 (partial work)
- Closes #123 (final PR)
-->

## How Has This Been Tested?
<!-- Describe how you validated your changes -->
- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Manual testing (describe steps below)

**Test Details:**
<!-- e.g. API endpoint tested, payload used, expected vs actual -->

## API Changes (if applicable)
<!-- Important for frontend + consumers -->
- [ ] No API changes
- [ ] New endpoint(s)
- [ ] Modified request/response
- [ ] Breaking change

**Details:**
<!-- Include route, request DTO, response DTO, status codes -->

## Database Changes (if applicable)
- [ ] No DB changes
- [ ] Migration added
- [ ] Schema updated
- [ ] Seed data updated

**Migration Notes:**
<!-- e.g. dotnet ef migrations add ... -->

## Configuration Changes (if applicable)
- [ ] No config changes
- [ ] appsettings updated
- [ ] New environment variables required

**Details:**
<!-- Describe required keys, example values -->

## Performance / Impact
<!-- Optional but valuable -->
- Any performance considerations?
- Any potential bottlenecks or risks?

## Logs / Observability
- [ ] Logging added/updated
- [ ] Metrics/Tracing considered

## Types of Changes
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies added
- [ ] Proper error handling implemented
- [ ] Logging added where necessary
- [ ] API responses follow `ResponseWrapper` format
- [ ] Sensitive data is not exposed
- [ ] Migration tested (if applicable)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)

<!-- Anything ops/dev should know after merge -->
